meaning: adj.九倍的,九重的adv.九倍地,九重地
examples: Within a year the price of BYD's shares had risen ninefold.
Last year Americans spent 2.3 trillion minutes chatting on cellphones, according to the US wireless trade association CTIA — a ninefold increase since 2000.
He claims he has grown his nest egg nearly ninefold in the last 10 years.
In the past five years, they have been heading the same way as the skyscrapers, rising ninefold.
